text:
```rust
pub struct CommitStats { commits, effectful, noop, command_count_sum,
                         output_count_sum, duration_us_sum, max_graph_nodes: i64 }
``` [...] `tenex-edge probe stats --help`:
```
Usage: tenex-edge probe stats [OPTIONS]
Options:
      --surface <SURFACE>  One surface (status | subscriptions | hook_context); omit for all
      --since <SINCE>      Only count commits at/after this unix-millis stamp [default: 0]
      --json               Emit the raw JSON the daemon returned instead of the human view
```
Sample render over a seeded ledger (status: 2 effectful + 1 suppressed no-op):
```
probe stats  (since=0)

surface        commits effectful   noop     cmds   frames     dur_us  nodes
status               3         2      1        3        0        750      6
subscriptions        1         1      0        1        0        100      5
``` [...] | Counter | Question it answers |
|---|---|
| `status.commits`, `status.published`, `status.suppressed` (commit produced no command), split by trigger (`on_tick`/`on_turn_*`/`on_distill`/`on_channels_changed`) | **How many publishes did dedup avoid?** The old path published every ~30s heartbeat per session regardless; suppressed-tick count × old-path behavior = avoided relay writes. |
| `status.refresh_vs_replace` | Is the NIP-40 re-arm actually distinct from content churn? |
| `subs.opens`, `subs.closes`, `subs.coalesced_joins`, `subs.live_now`, `subs.max_live` | **Open/close balance over a long run** — the leak, quantified. `closes + live_now == opens` or something is wrong. |
| `hook.renders`, `hook.frames_emitted`, `hook.unchanged` | **How many hook recomputes were no-ops?** (`FrameKind::Unchanged` is already computed per render, then thrown away.) |
| `<surface>.commit_duration_us` histogram (p50/p95/max), `<surface>.node_count` | **Is the per-commit clone cost acceptable at real load?** Measured where it happens, per graph, correlated with graph size. |
 [...] Honesty requirement baked into the UX: the "vs the old 5-trigger path" comparison is a **model, not a measurement** — the old path is deleted. `probe stats` must label it: `avoided publishes (modeled vs 30s-heartbeat baseline): ~1,240/day`. A probe console that silently flatters is worse than none.
